statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow slice: Diagnostics now has a `Warning Light Triage` flow for red/amber indicators, MID messages, multiple warning lights, and recent battery/service context.

Changed:
- [diagnostics.html](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/diagnostics.html): added workflow-index card, quick-check row, and the new triage section.
- [search-data.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/search-data.js): added `warning light` search coverage.
- [tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1): updated Diagnostics workflow assertions to seven cards plus warning-light search.
- [service-worker.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/service-worker.js): bumped cache to `ridgeline-console-v260`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, and `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`. No `ANTON.md` change was needed.

Verification:
- Internal link/anchor audit passed for 16 HTML files.
- Edge smoke still hit the known `--dump-dom` missing-main failure.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed desktop and iPhone-width checks, no horizontal overflow, warning-light anchor settling, search result coverage, and Search Escape cleanup.
- Screenshots saved under `debug-screenshots/audit-v260-*`.

Source used: Honda 2019 Ridgeline Dashboard Details guide: https://owners.honda.com/utility/download?path=%2Fstatic%2Fpdfs%2F2019%2FRidgeline%2FMY19_Ridgeline_Dashboard_Details.pdf

Next safe slice: add a garage-note template for warning-light incidents, so the user can capture exact indicator/MID text, photos, recent work, and battery context before troubleshooting.
